title: Tamil Nadu Assembly session updates: Chief Minister Vijay's TVK wins trust vote with 144 ‘ayes’
description: Udhayanidhi led DMK MLAs' walkout prior to voting; 25 rebel AIADMK MLAs from C.Ve. Shanmugam camp extended support to TVK while 22 AIADMK MLAs of the Edappadi Palaniswami faction voted against the confidence motion.
